strengths: 15+ years of full-stack experience across web, mobile, and embedded systems
Strong TypeScript/Node.js and React background with current AI-agent/MCP work at re:cinq
Demonstrated software craftsmanship: TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based development
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience listed in resume
Kotlin and Python not mentioned in skills or work history
Limited cloud breadth shown (AWS CDK only; no GCP/Azure or Kubernetes depth beyond GISCollective)

key_factors.factor: Missing Nest.js and Kotlin/Python in stack

response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned senior/staff engineer with deep TypeScript, Node.js, and React experience, plus directly relevant current work on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling — a strong match for the role's primary stack and AI-agent requirement. Gaps around Nest.js, Kotlin, and Python are real but learnable given the breadth of languages already mastered (including DLang, Java, C/C++). Strong craftsmanship signals (TDD, CI/CD, workshops, open-source) further support fit.
